name: Colonel Campbell
description: Command support. Donne les objectifs, rappelle la priorité infiltration, réagit aux alertes.
availabilityNotes: Shares 140.85 with Naomi Hunter; routing depends on the selected contact and narrative context.

name: Mei Ling
description: Contact mémoire/sauvegarde. Peut servir à enregistrer la simulation locale.

name: Otacon
description: Support technique, sécurité, robots, caméras et systèmes électroniques.

name: Naomi Hunter
description: Support médical et biologique. Peut intervenir selon blessure ou état du joueur.
availabilityNotes: Shares 140.85 with Campbell and may not answer in every story state.

name: Nastasha Romanenko
description: Spécialiste armes, nucléaire et matériel militaire.

name: Master Miller
description: Conseils de survie, infiltration et discipline de terrain.

name: Meryl Silverburgh
description: Contact de terrain, utile pour certaines phases d’infiltration.

name: Deepthroat
description: Signal inconnu. Contact secret à utiliser pour événements spéciaux ou boss hints.

name: Roy Campbell
description: Commandant opérationnel pour le pack MSX/MG2. Donne ordres, conseils et rappel d’objectif.

name: Master Miller
description: Instructeur survie/mental pour le pack MSX/MG2.

name: George Kasler
description: Spécialiste armes ennemies et mercenaires.

name: Holly White
description: Contact de terrain pour renseignements sur installations et routes.

name: Johan Jacobsen
description: Expert animalier et environnement.

name: Otacon
description: Support technique et mission pour le chapitre Tanker.
gameTitle: Metal Gear Solid 2: Sons of Liberty
availabilityNotes: Tanker chapter support line at 141.12 and dedicated save line at 140.96.

name: Colonel
description: Support mission du chapitre Plant.
gameTitle: Metal Gear Solid 2: Sons of Liberty
availabilityNotes: The Plant support persona is part of the Patriots/GW simulation.

name: Rose
description: Contact sauvegarde dédié du chapitre Plant.
gameTitle: Metal Gear Solid 2: Sons of Liberty

name: Major Zero

name: Para-Medic (Save)
description: Ligne de sauvegarde Para-Medic.

name: Para-Medic
description: Support médecine, flore, faune et survie alimentaire.

name: The Boss
description: Conseils armes, objets et techniques de survie.

name: Big Boss
description: FOXHOUND commander issuing Operation Intrude N313 orders. His guidance becomes increasingly unreliable late in the operation.
availabilityNotes: Primary command contact; story progression can make his instructions deliberately misleading.

name: Kyle Schneider
description: Leader of the Outer Heaven resistance and former architect familiar with the fortress layout.
availabilityNotes: Unlocked after establishing contact with the Outer Heaven resistance.

name: Diane
description: Outer Heaven resistance contact providing intelligence on enemy mercenaries and combat threats.

name: Jennifer
description: Resistance operative infiltrated into Outer Heaven's medical staff while searching for her brother.

name: Iroquois Pliskin
description: SEAL survivor who assists Raiden during the Big Shell incident.
gameTitle: Metal Gear Solid 2: Sons of Liberty
availabilityNotes: Available during the Plant chapter before his identity is openly acknowledged.

name: Peter Stillman
description: NYPD bomb-disposal consultant supporting the Big Shell explosive search.
gameTitle: Metal Gear Solid 2: Sons of Liberty

name: Mr. X
description: Unknown cybernetic field contact delivering classified warnings and equipment.
gameTitle: Metal Gear Solid 2: Sons of Liberty
